self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve Engine adaptation quality by carrying forward an explicit progressive planning seam instead of flattening every stage onto one base input.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP bounded result turns the parked ts-edge finding into a separate Architecture implementation target for extraction-to-adaptation chaining.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP case, the ts-edge finding existed only as a parked STANDARD note and the Engine still had no explicit Architecture-owned implementation target for progressive stage chaining.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The Engine refactor can now be materialized as a bounded implementation slice without reopening the original STANDARD source case.

decision.rationale: The DEEP opener establishes one bounded Engine implementation slice that is ready to be materialized as Architecture-owned product logic.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
